jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer
jobs.descriptionPlain: Build the future of AI-powered code editing. You will work across the stack to deliver features that help developers write better code faster. We use TypeScript, React, and Rust.

jobs.title: ML Engineer, Code Generation
jobs.descriptionPlain: Work on large language models for code generation. Fine-tune and evaluate models, build inference infrastructure, and improve code completion quality across languages.
